text: Cookie-bite hearing loss When mid-range sounds are harder to hear Frequency Hz (pitch) 10250 500 1,000 2,000 4,000 8,000 0 l--ﬂ--= < O~ . SRS T T T T oe g Wi / X Leftear S = < Bone = Y conduction S 0, = 60 ag & Decreased hearing ability 80 100 People with cookie-bite hearing loss struggle to hear mid-range pitches. Most speech and music is in the mid-range. It is known as "cookie-bite" hearing loss because of the audiogram pattern that looks akin to a cookie with a bite out of it.
